name: Consensus
one_liner: AI-powered academic search engine over 200M+ peer-reviewed papers, exposing a REST 'quick search' API and an official remote MCP server for grounding agents in scientific evidence.
access_notes: The consensus.app search API is 'available by application only' per its docs/pricing, with baseline pricing ~$0.10 per call plus a platform fee. There is no self-serve dev tier that instantly issues working API keys; access is gated behind an application. The official remote MCP server (mcp.consensus.app/mcp) is self-serve via OAuth sign-in and does not require the API application, but MCP usage is tied to a Consensus subscription rather than free programmatic API credentials.
api_notes: Documented public API is minimal: primarily a v1 quick_search endpoint (POST/GET api.consensus.app/v1/quick_search) returning ~top 20 relevant papers with metadata (citation count, publish date, etc.). Docs published as OpenAPI plus an llms.txt index at docs.consensus.app. A handful of endpoints, not a broad surface.
mcp_notes: Vendor ships an official hosted remote MCP server at https://mcp.consensus.app/mcp (docs.consensus.app/docs/mcp, consensus.app/home/mcp). Verified/maintained by Consensus; supports Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Codex. Uses OAuth: client opens browser to sign in and authorize on first connect. Lets clients search/synthesize over the peer-reviewed corpus.
main_blocker: REST API is application-gated (approval + paid per-call pricing), so working credentials are not self-serve; however the official OAuth-based remote MCP offers a self-serve alternative path.

evidence.claim: Consensus API docs show a v1 quick_search endpoint returning top ~20 papers with metadata; OpenAPI + llms.txt index published.
Official hosted remote MCP server at mcp.consensus.app/mcp, maintained by Consensus, uses OAuth browser sign-in, supports Claude/ChatGPT/Cursor etc.
Consensus API is available by application only, baseline pricing ~$0.10 per call plus a platform fee.
Consensus MCP marketing page describing building agents on the peer-reviewed corpus via MCP.

open_questions: Exact auth scheme for the REST quick_search API (API key header vs bearer token) not confirmed from a fetched page; the docs.consensus.app/reference page did not expose auth details and the pricing page returned 403. Note: goconsensus.com/support.goconsensus.com is a separate 'Consensus' company (demo-automation SaaS) and was excluded as not the consensus.app research product.
